ac_text: Required fields order date, customer, and at least one line item must be present.

expected_result: HTTP 201 is returned. Response body contains the newly created order ID

ac_text: Only valid state transitions are allowed.
title: Valid state transition from 'New' to 'In Progress'
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment

steps: Send a PUT request to update order status to 'In Progress'
expected_result: HTTP 200 is returned. Response body contains updated order status: 'In Progress'

ac_text: Only valid state transitions are allowed.
title: Invalid state transition from 'New' to 'Cancelled'

ac_text: Only valid state transitions are allowed.
title: Security: Unauthorized access to update order status
preconditions: Application is deployed and accessible in UAT environment
User account exists with role Sales and does not have edit permission on Order Status module
steps: Send a PUT request to update order status
expected_result: HTTP 401 is returned. Response body contains error message: 'Unauthorized access'
